title: Update enforcement mode - Illumio
content:
Update the enforcement mode for one or more workloads.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Illumio pack (Illumio, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: IllumioCore, illumio-workloads-list.

    task:

      version: -1
      name: Update enforcement mode
      description: Update the Enforcement Mode for one or more workloads.
      script: IllumioCore|||illumio-enforcement-mode-update
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: IllumioCore
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - '2'
    scriptarguments:
      enforcement_mode:
        simple: Selective
      execution-timeout:
        simple: '3600'
      workloads:
        complex:
          root: Illumio
          accessor: workload_hrefs
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
